THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST, ALAN T AN INDIVIDUAL $22,262.75 PRINCIPAL, $2,575.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,216.33 INTEREST, $441.31 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,495.39, IT IS FURTHER ORDER THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT, THE PROPERTY. DEFENDANT SHALL TRANSFER POSSESSION OF THE ABOVE-DESCRIBED PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF FORTHWITH; IT IS FURTHER ORDER THAT UPON THE RETURNED AND SALE OF THE PROPERTY, PLAINTIFF MAY, UPON EX-PARTE APPLICATION, AMEND THIS JUDGMENT TO SET FORTH THE DEFICIENCY BALANCE. ( SEE SCAN DOCUMENT)
